response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal demonstrable C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments over a decade ago, and no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to mentor and lead through workshops and community initiatives
concerns: Lack of recent or substantial C++/STL development experience
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
No evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency, or embedded systems work in the last 9+ years
